backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes search functionality by constructing DuckDuckGo API URLs and making HTTP outcalls, with error handling for failed or unauthorized outcall requests.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single rebuild/redeploy feature to its associated frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for documentation or build planning purposes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a light/dark color system including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app at the root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/public/google0e657d46cb230404.h: Static Google Search Console site verification file served at a well-known URL to confirm site ownership.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the SearchInterface inside a full-height flex container.
frontend/src/components/InAppBrowser.tsx: Fullscreen modal iframe browser component with a header bar, loading spinner, and automatic detection of blocked/embedded content with an open-in-new-tab fallback.
Main search UI component that handles form submission, displays DuckDuckGo results with flattened topic cards, context-aware error states, and integrates the InAppBrowser overlay for link navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: Custom React hook that calls a backend actor to perform searches, managing loading/error state and parsing ICP-specific error codes and canister trap messages into user-friendly strings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for a light/dark color theme using oklch values, plus a fadeIn animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility that detects URLs in plain text and converts them to clickable anchor elements or callback-driven buttons, plus a helper to validate whether a string is a URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom border radii, font families, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations, with the animate and typography plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project metadata file tracking schema version, existing features, and build state for a rebuild/refresh of the current application preserving DuckDuckGo search, in-app browser modal, and error handling functionality.
